series_metadata.series_title: GAF-29 Claim For Reissuance of Voided Warrant
series_metadata.series_description: Forms used to reissue another warrant once a warrant has been voided.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Once OBM form is imaged to paid claim file, paper can be shredded. ; Electronic: Electronic images stored as part of a paid claim file are stored indefinitely., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
